🎯 WIDE RECEIVERS:
  • CeeDee Lamb (DAL) - WR1 with consistent target share (Playoff push - prioritize floor)

🦵 KICKER:
  • Jake Elliott (PHI) - Accurate kicker on high-scoring offense (Playoff push - prioritize floor)

🪑 BENCH ANALYSIS & OPPORTUNITIES:
  📍 Backup QBs: Aaron Rodgers (NYJ)

💪 TEAM STRENGTHS & WEAKNESSES:
  ✅ STRENGTHS:
  ⚠️ AREAS OF CONCERN:
    • QB depth concern - only 1 QB rostered

    • TE depth - consider adding backup for bye weeks/injuries

🎯 WEEK 16 STRATEGIC FOCUS:
  🏆 PLAYOFF STRATEGY:
    • Prioritize high-floor players over boom-bust options
    • Start your studs: Bucky Irving, CeeDee Lamb, DJ Moore
    • Avoid players with rest risk on locked playoff teams
